description: Overall, our team is satisfied with the ACL tool. We are currently using it to track analytics projects and will begin to integrate more risks and controls in the coming weeks.
author: Thomas S.
pros: The ACL tool is easy to use and offers convenient reporting.
cons: The ACL tool needs better or more configurable way to track progress on projects. All steps should not be weighted equally. Overall, the scheduler could be enhanced with more options.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Features that are most impactful 1. Ease of Data Extraction and connections to various ERPs and Databases. 2.Functionalities like Fuzzy Duplicates, Joins which helps to perform Descriptive and Diagnostic analysis 3. Log of steps performed to achieve Data Analytics Results.
cons: Dashboard features should be similar to Tableau. Export of results to Excel - One should be able to do the formatting similar to Excel within ACL for Windows application itself.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The features and bells and whistles that address all my needs
cons: None that i am aware of any that i like least about
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall, it has helped automate some of our audit processes. However, sometimes it has limitations and we have to use a SQL/Teradata, Tableau, or Excel which defeats the purpose at times.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: One of my favorite, and most helpful things about ACL is the data import. It is clean and quick, and very easy to learn. Also the scripting is very helpful because you can rerun processes without redoing the work and have scripts run automatically.
cons: There are features of ACL that make it difficult to work with if you are trying to take notes or change a cell's information. For example, you can't really add a new column with your notes in specific cells.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very helpful in doing analysis GB worth of data. Saves a lot of time. Relied upon by management as it is able to preserve integrity of data.
cons: For new release of product, I need to download the whole installer instead instead of just having the updates. But other than that, none that I think of as of this time.

description: Professional approach. It was the best solution I found and I did demonstrations with 5 companies.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Allows for tracking of findings, mitigation actions etc. Includes modules for internal audit, compliance and enterprise risk management.
cons: Time consuming to build and implement in an simple/user friendly way. Sometimes the functionality is more complex than what I actually need.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: in actual fact, highbond helped make continuous auditing and GRC more efficient and easy.
cons: I haven't encountered any cons since I started using HighBond

description: The audit process is highly integrated by using the Audit bond
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Integration between different bonds within the platform
cons: No policy bond available in the region until now
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Valentina G.
pros: Excellent!! The way to treat customers and how it gives you a wide variety of services, gives you the best security, knows exactly what customers want and need.
cons: I really do not have any complaints about this company, I only have good comments and good reviews, I am very satisfied with the work done, I am very happy and I recommend it 100%

author: Suhail R.
pros: Ease of managing large data and the ease of applying scripts compared to MS office.
cons: The history and the scripts are not easy to find and store.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: You get what you pay for and the analytics is what we wanted. We were not disappointed. I don't know if I would do the GRC portion of the software again, or if I would negotiate a little better for that portion.
author: David C.
pros: The analytics are the main reason we went with HighBond. The ability to analyze thousands of credit card transactions and within minutes identify the outlier transactions was extremely beneficial to the organization. Gas card theft and personal purchases made with a company card were easily identified and it didn't take long for the news to spread throughout the organization. A new sheriff arrived in town.
cons: For our organization the GRC part of the software was a little clunky and manual to setup and use on a regular basis. Having to identify the risks and then enter the controls in a different area and then having to link the two of them together, made the process cumbersome and we had pushback from auditors that did not want to use the software.

description: In the current Work-From-Home setup due to the pandemic, I realized how beneficial the Highbond platform was to our department. Unlike other departments in our organization, we did not have to worry/adjust much to the current WFH working arrangements because we knew that we could easily continue our audit projects from the comforts of our home because we have up in our sleeves Highbond which we can easily access with our laptops , and even with our mobile phones.
author: Micha Joy J.
pros: ACL, now Highbond, had been very easy to use from the get-go. The features that had been most impact for me as user were (1) the timesheet; (2) the automatic notifications/reminders to auditees (for requests/action items); and (3) the easily downloadable reports.
cons: This is something very minor and not really a feature that I like least, but something that needs to be fixed in the timesheet, particularly in the time report. I just noticed when I was try getting to get a time report, the days in the month, as reflected in the calendar, did not reflect the actual day and date. Example, right now, I'm looking at the calendar in time report and June 17, 2021 is reflected there as a Sunday.

review_title: Great product with forward facing technologies
description: This solution is providing me an integrated solution to streamline our SOX Compliance Evaluation and Non-SOX projects with a lot of great workflow capabilities.
author: Charles B.
pros: Customizable field setups ACL Analytics Included Potential for Robotics/Automation Integrated Workflows
cons: - Does not have an elegant solution for selecting/downloading individual areas (start to finish control export, without exporting full sections of your file (i.e. walkthroughs for every process, not just the one you want with the accompanying testing workpapers and background details in 1 download) - Open text box for documenting has table limits not friendly for exporting or using its advanced features (team tries to push attaching excel workpaper attachments instead) - No auto-selection possibility with population files for business process controls
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great tool for any size of audit shops
description: The interface is user friend. The build in functions make the application very easy to use. There is a learning curve. Just like any kind of sports, if you want to be good at it, you got to practice. Use it often, even for low lying fruit type of activities.
author: Wai C.
pros: Combined Analytic and Highbond (Robotic), the two applications is a powerful pair. They can save a lot of audit hours and generates huge value to the organization.
cons: It is an application and requires a set of skillsets to use the software effectively. The biggest challenge is talent. Training and promoting on using the software is key. Once you have a talented team, HighBond will soar like an eagle.
author_profession: Manager of Risk, Audit and Compliance

review_title: HighBond review from an ACL user.
description: It really makes you work smart. Deliver quality output. Helps the auditor in doing repetitive tasks.
author: Valyrie E.
pros: It enables you to work smart. Deliver quality output. Helps the auditor in doing repetitive tasks.
cons: Currently, our company dont have the complete subscription or functionality. The price can be intimidating. We are currently revisiting our options.

description: We are currently using ACL for everything from gathering of statistical information for senior management, compiling risk factors for audit selection to analyzing taxpayer information prior to performing an audit
author: Elton H.
pros: The ability to script repetitive tasks. ACL allows the user to “code” the steps performed so that they can be repeated at a click of a button. This whole process can be done without knowing any programming language because ACL records the steps that you have taken, which can then be copied into a script and run whenever it is needed.
cons: The PDF converter. ACL has the ability to convert a pdf into a table, however the PDF needs to be a fairly simple one otherwise the data columns tend to jump around.

description: Overall I think the highbond packages and online user forums/trainings are an excellent investment for any internal audit program.
author: Peter T.
pros: My favorite parts of ACL from Highbond are the scripting functions that allow me to easily backtrack my work and the ability to perform lots of different computations on the data without corrupting source material.
cons: I dislike that the visual components of ACL are limited.

description: HB provides with a sophisticated and highly performing tool for data analysis. Furthermore, its helpdesk function is outstanding. Plus the community is very engaging.
author: Zois S.
pros: Ease of use. Many features. Audit trail in the analysis. Engaging community providing ideas and ready-to-use code. Ability to process many forms of data. Ability to process large amounts of data.
cons: There are very few things not to like. None comes to mind at the moment.

description: Very useful tool for data extraction and data analyze.
author: Themeishan S.
pros: User Friendly so that even accounting professionals also could use this.
cons: Not every function are made available in the tab.

review_title: Great product for audit tracking and compliance.
description: Overall, the product provides a great outline to your audit program.
author: Allie B.
pros: The software provides you an opportunity to develop throughout workflows
cons: Unfortunately, the software does require a lot of clicks to get to all the available features.

description: Great product! I highly recommend it!
author: Giovaana M.
pros: I love how easy it is to use, meaning the customer was really thought about and considered on this. There are many functions that are very useful when working smarter, specially when it comes to Audit, sometimes time is of essence.
cons: So far there is no complaints with this software.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Fumio N.
pros: This product is very easy to keep track of audit progress status and remaining audit procedures.
cons: Reporting and Analytics requires some customization.

description: Everyone I have meet with and worked with has been amazing. The webinars always give me great insight and tips to take back to my scripting.
author: Amanda Z.
pros: I like how easy it is to use the Macros to create scripts that can be used for repetitive tasks. The free online support center and training classes help learning the system a breeze.
cons: I wish the desktop and web/robotics systems worked together a little easier and did not require you to upload data to use the robotics function.

author: Susan B.
pros: We have been using ACL for the past decade for data analytics. The software is helping us to do 100% analysis of the data population we are evaluating.
cons: Because of cost implications, our ACL licenses are limited.

author: Sammy V.
pros: Easy to pick up and learn. Allows you to rapidly analyze datasets and action.
cons: Very slow performance. Doing basic things analogous to 'a subselect in SQL' is more painful than it needs to be.
